backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining the CreativeProject data model and CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete, list) with in-memory Map storage and blob-storage mixin support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking the ProjectCard visual-size-reduction feature to its affected file (ProjectCard.tsx) and relevant components/test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to one-sentence descriptions, serving as a quick reference for the purpose of each frontend module.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for the full design-token color system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Creative Tracker' that mounts the React app at #root via the Vite module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with four routes (dashboard, create, project detail, edit) nested under a shared Layout.
frontend/src/components/ImageUpload.tsx: Image upload component supporting multi-file selection, object-URL previews, per-file upload progress bars, and removal, using ExternalBlob from the backend.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: App shell component rendering a sticky header with branding, Internet Identity login/logout controls, a router Outlet for page content, and a footer.
frontend/src/components/ProjectCard.tsx: Compact project summary card with a 96px thumbnail, small typography, 1-line clamps, status badge overlay, and click-to-navigate behavior to the project detail page.
frontend/src/components/ProjectForm.tsx: A React form component for creating or editing a creative project, with fields for title, description, dates, images, and status, including validation logic.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication state, including login, logout, and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations (get all, get one, create, update, delete) on creative projects via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines CSS custom properties for a sophisticated earth-tone design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single utility function `cn` that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/CreateProjectPage.tsx: A page component that renders the ProjectForm for creating a new project, handles submission via the useCreateProject mutation, and navigates back to the dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: The main dashboard page that displays a status overview (done, in-progress, approval-pending counts) and a list of project cards, with guards for unauthenticated and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/EditProjectPage.tsx: Page component for editing an existing project, fetching project data by ID and submitting updates via a ProjectForm with loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ProjectDetailPage.tsx: Page component displaying full details of a single project with edit and delete actions, including a confirmation dialog before deletion.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based colors, typography fonts, border radii, box shadows, and accordion animations, plus typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file describing the Amazon marketing agency creative-team management app, its architectural notes, implemented features, and versioning information.
